meta.title: Residential Electrical Services Charlotte NC | Johnson's Electric
meta.description: Licensed residential electricians in Charlotte, NC. Wiring, panel upgrades, outlets, lighting, troubleshooting & more. Same-day service available. Call (704) 555-0199.
meta.og_title: Residential Electrical Services | Johnson's Electric of Charlotte
meta.og_description: Charlotte's trusted residential electricians. From outlet repairs to full home rewiring: safe, reliable, and code-compliant. Request a free estimate today.

hero.label: Residential Electrical Services
hero.heading: Charlotte's Trusted Home Electricians
hero.subheading: From outlet repairs to full home rewiring, Johnson's Electric keeps your family safe and your home powered. Licensed, insured, and code-compliant, always.

intro.label: Why Homeowners Choose Us
intro.heading: Residential Electrical Work Done Right the First Time
intro.body1: Electrical problems in your home aren't just inconvenient. They're a safety risk. Johnson's Electric of Charlotte has been serving Charlotte homeowners since 2003, delivering professional residential electrical services with no shortcuts, no guesswork, and no surprises on the bill.
intro.body2: Our licensed electricians treat your home with respect, arrive on time, and explain everything in plain language before any work begins. Whether you need a simple outlet replaced or a complete rewire, you'll get the same quality workmanship and honest pricing.
intro.image_alt: Residential electrician working in a home

checklist.text: All work fully permitted and inspected
Clean workspaces: we protect your home

services.label: What We Offer
services.heading: Residential Electrical Services
services.subheading: A complete range of home electrical services to keep your Charlotte home safe, efficient, and up to code.

items.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
items.description: An outdated breaker panel is one of the leading causes of house fires. We upgrade older fuse boxes and undersized panels to modern, code-compliant electrical panels that meet your home's needs.

bullets.text: Fuse box to breaker panel replacement

items.title: Outlets & Switches
items.description: Sparking outlets, dead switches, and overloaded circuits are warning signs that shouldn't be ignored. We install, repair, and upgrade outlets and switches throughout your home quickly and safely.

items.title: Lighting Installation
items.description: Transform your home's ambiance and energy efficiency with professional lighting installation. From recessed lighting to ceiling fans, chandeliers to under-cabinet lighting: we do it all.

items.title: Home Rewiring
items.description: Older homes with aluminum or knob-and-tube wiring present serious fire hazards. We safely rewire your home with modern copper wiring, bringing your electrical system up to current NEC standards.

items.title: Electrical Troubleshooting
items.description: Tripping breakers, flickering lights, burning smells: our experienced electricians diagnose and resolve electrical issues that other contractors can't figure out. We find the root cause, not just the symptom.

items.title: Surge Protection
items.description: Protect your appliances, electronics, and home systems from power surges with whole-home surge protection. One properly installed surge protector at the panel safeguards everything in your home.

items.title: Smart Home Wiring
items.description: Ready to upgrade to a smart home? We install and wire smart switches, thermostats, doorbells, security systems, and whole-home automation infrastructure, done right the first time.

items.title: EV Charger Installation
items.description: Charge your electric vehicle conveniently at home with a professionally installed Level 2 EV charging station. We handle the dedicated circuit, permit, and installation from start to finish.

items.title: Smoke & CO Detector Wiring
items.description: Hardwired smoke and carbon monoxide detectors provide more reliable protection than battery-only units. We install interconnected detector systems that meet current North Carolina building codes.

benefits.label: The Johnson's Electric Difference
benefits.heading: Why Charlotte Homeowners Trust Us
benefits.subheading: We know inviting a contractor into your home requires trust. Here's what sets Johnson's Electric apart.

items.title: Licensed Master Electrician On Every Job
items.description: Every project is overseen by a licensed master electrician, not a helper or apprentice working unsupervised. Your home gets expert-level attention from start to finish.

items.title: Flat-Rate Pricing Before We Start
items.description: You'll receive a written estimate that details exactly what will be done and what it costs. No time-and-materials billing, no scope creep, no invoice shock when the job is done.

items.title: We Respect Your Home
items.description: Drop cloths, shoe covers, careful drilling, and thorough cleanup are standard on every job. We leave your home in the same condition we found it, just with better electrical work.

items.title: Permits Pulled & Inspections Passed
items.description: We never skip permits to save time. Permitted electrical work protects your home's value, keeps your homeowner's insurance valid, and ensures the work is done correctly.

items.title: 24/7 Emergency Response
items.description: Electrical emergencies don't follow a 9-to-5 schedule. Our team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week for situations that can't wait: power outages, arcing, burning smells, and more.

items.title: 1-Year Written Workmanship Warranty
items.description: Every residential service we perform is backed by a written 1-year workmanship warranty. If something we installed or repaired doesn't perform properly, we come back and fix it at no charge.

process.label: How It Works
process.heading: Our Simple 4-Step Process
process.subheading: From first call to final inspection, we make getting electrical work done stress-free. No guessing, no hidden steps. Just clear communication and quality results.
process.image_alt: Electrician working on a residential panel upgrade
process.highlight_text: Every project is permitted, inspected, and backed by our 1-year written workmanship warranty.

steps.title: Call or Request Online
steps.description: Reach us by phone or submit a request form. We respond within 1 hour during business hours and are available 24/7 for emergencies.

steps.title: Free In-Home Estimate
steps.description: A licensed electrician visits your home to assess the project and provide a written, flat-rate quote. No obligation, no pressure.

steps.title: Scheduled Service
steps.description: We schedule your project at a time that works for you, including same-day and next-day availability for most services.

steps.title: Permitted, Inspected & Done
steps.description: We complete the work, pull all required permits, and ensure everything passes inspection. You receive documentation of the completed work and warranty.

faq.label: Common Questions
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Answers to the most common questions Charlotte homeowners have about our residential electrical services.

items.question: Do I need a permit for electrical work in Charlotte?
items.answer: Most electrical work in Charlotte and Mecklenburg County requires a permit and inspection. We handle the entire permit process for you. This ensures the work is done to code and protects your home's value and insurance coverage.

items.question: How much does residential electrical work cost?
items.answer: Costs vary by project. A simple outlet replacement may run $100-$200, while a full panel upgrade can cost $1,500-$4,000 or more. We always provide a detailed written estimate before any work begins, no surprises.

items.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
items.answer: Most panel upgrades are completed in a single day - typically 4 to 8 hours. We coordinate with your utility company for the brief service disconnect and schedule inspections to minimize disruption.

items.question: Can you work on older homes with knob-and-tube wiring?
items.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in updating older electrical systems, including knob-and-tube and aluminum wiring. We assess the full scope of the work and provide a clear plan to bring your home up to current safety standards.

items.question: Do you offer same-day service?
items.answer: Yes. We offer same-day and next-day appointments for most residential services, subject to availability. Emergency situations are prioritized and dispatched as fast as possible, any time of day or night.

items.question: What warranty do you offer on your work?
items.answer: All residential electrical work performed by Johnson's Electric is covered by a 1-year written workmanship warranty. If any issue arises from our work within that period, we return to resolve it at no cost to you.

cta.label: Ready to Get Started?
cta.heading: Schedule Your Residential Electrical Service
cta.body: Get a free, no-obligation estimate from Charlotte's most trusted residential electricians. We respond within 1 hour during business hours.
